results.title: Florida 24th District debate: What do you offer as a candidate?
results.description: The first question posed to candidates for Florida’s 24th District was: What do you offer for this district that no one else on this stage can match?

results.title: More people booked into ICE detention in June than in any month since crackdown began
results.description: More than 43,000 immigrants were arrested last month as DHS continues to detain people in less-publicized enforcement surges.

results.title: Virginia’s Abortion Amendment Would Strike Down Statutory Rape Laws
results.description: Virginia Democrats have supported a “Reproductive Freedom” constitutional amendment, but critics warn that it would vacate laws against statutory rape, and a lawsuit seeks to invalidate it. “Virginia’s so-called reproductive freedom amendment goes far beyond the issue of abortion,” Josh Hetzler, executive director of the Founding Freedoms Law Center and an attorney for the nonprofits challenging the [...] The post Virginia’s Abortion Amendment Would Strike Down Statutory Rape Laws appeared first on LifeNews.com .

results.title: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez jumps to front of NH 2028 Dem primary field
results.description: In the latest snapshot of the 2028 presidential race, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-NY, now leads the potential 2028 Democratic primary field in New Hampshire, surpassing former Secretary of Transportation Pete Buttigieg for the first time since the University of New Hampshire Survey Center started polling the race in October 2025.The result follows a late June Saint Anselm poll that found Ocasio-Cortez had surged, but hadn't taken over Buttigieg's lead.The new UNH poll, released July 22, found that 22% of likely 2028 Democratic primary voters said they would vote for Ocasio-Cortez, up from 15% in February. She is followed closely by...
